title: TrackEvent
description: A single event to be tracked for the user.

eventKey.description: The key of the event to track. Use "impression" for automatic view tracking or a custom event key defined in the Personalize Management API.

experience_uid.description: The UID of the experience associated with this event. Required for impression events.

variant_uid.description: The UID of the variant shown to the user. Required for impression events.
